title: Eggless engagement and wedding cakes — custom order, Granville to Westmead
summary:
Most bakeries in Western Sydney will make an eggless cake on request. We don't do it on request. It's the only way we bake.

This is why Granville and Merrylands families who are vegetarian, Jain, or halal-observant order from Wigram Street — not because we accommodate them, but because they never have to ask.

Custom eggless engagement cakes and wedding tiers in any of 15 flavours, including Rasmalai and Mango. Sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch. Multi-tier on custom quote. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache — your choice.

48-hour minimum notice. Open daily until 10 PM. Harris Park, Wigram Street.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: can't find eggless wedding cake Western Sydney
